name: WorkSource Seattle–King County
description: Free employment services funded by the state. Resume writing, job search workshops, interview coaching, and connections to training programs. Walk-ins and appointments.
description_es: Servicios de empleo gratuitos financiados por el estado. Escritura de currículum, talleres de búsqueda de empleo, entrenamiento para entrevistas y conexiones a programas de capacitación.

name: FareStart — Culinary Job Training
description: 16-week paid culinary training program for adults facing barriers to employment. 85% graduate job placement rate. Includes food handler certification and job placement support.
description_es: Programa de capacitación culinaria remunerada de 16 semanas para adultos con barreras de empleo. Tasa de colocación laboral del 85%. Incluye certificación de manipulación de alimentos.

name: Year Up — Tech & Business Training
description: Full-time, 6-month paid training program for young adults ages 18–24. Learn IT support, cybersecurity, data analytics, or business operations. Leads to corporate internship.
description_es: Programa de capacitación remunerado de 6 meses a tiempo completo para jóvenes adultos de 18 a 24 años. Aprenda soporte de TI, ciberseguridad, análisis de datos u operaciones comerciales.

name: Goodwill Job Training & Education
description: Free job training, career counseling, and employment placement. Programs in retail, food service, warehousing, and customer service. Walk-in welcome.
description_es: Capacitación laboral gratuita, orientación profesional y colocación laboral. Programas en venta al por menor, servicios de alimentos, almacenamiento y servicio al cliente.

name: Pioneer Human Services
address: 7440 W Marginal Way S, Seattle, WA 98108
description: Employment and transitional work programs for people with histories of criminal justice involvement, substance use, or homelessness. Paid work experience available.
description_es: Programas de empleo y trabajo de transición para personas con historial de justicia penal, uso de sustancias o sin hogar. Experiencia laboral remunerada disponible.

name: ANEW — Trades Training for Women
address: 601 S Dearborn St Suite 100, Seattle, WA 98134
description: Free 8-week pre-apprenticeship program for women and underrepresented groups entering construction trades. Hands-on training in electrical, plumbing, and carpentry. Stipend provided.
description_es: Programa de preaprendizaje gratuito de 8 semanas para mujeres y grupos subrepresentados que ingresan a oficios de construcción. Capacitación práctica en electricidad, plomería y carpintería.
